creator: marcel@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 160540
Loader that mostly supports booting UGA!

Ok, this should hopefully almost work. What is expected to be wrong is the stride. What this means is that the console output of the kernel will be skewed to the point of being unreadable, but the important thing I hope works is that you *will* have console output from the kernel!

If we have skewed console output, then all that's left is to determine the stride and we have UGA support.

If the colors are off, let me know...
